prose: Fukui reactivity indices computed for nitrobenzene (14 atoms) at the DFT level, tier 'standard' (B3LYP/def2-TZVP), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1, using PySCF via the chemkit fukui-reactivity skill. Partial charges via Mulliken (PySCF). Geometry taken as-is from the user-supplied .xyz (no re-optimization). N−1 cation: charge +1, multiplicity 2; N+1 anion: charge −1, multiplicity 2. Exact four-center integrals (no density fitting). All three SCFs converged; Fukui charge-conservation checks passed (sum(f+)=1.0000, sum(f−)=1.0000). Integrity: trustworthy=true, status=ok. No warnings reported. Headline value: most electrophilic site f+ = 0.49641783 at atom 4 (ipso carbon bearing the nitro group). Most nucleophilic site f− = 0.10728820 at atom 5 (ortho carbon). CLI: python .../cli.py fukui nitrobenzene.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1. Output: nitrobenzene_fukui_dft.json; plot: agent_call_01_plot.png.
